channel.title: Ronak J Vanpariya
channel.description: Recent content on Ronak J Vanpariya

item.title: Make your own Custom Birthday Wisher
item.description: Introduction 👋 Hello friend, 📜 🙂 🏠 I was looking for a very creative way to wish someone " Happy Birthday “ 🎉 .

item.title: How to Add Product Meta Data if Order Not Split by Woo Order Splitter Plugin
item.description: How to add product meta data if order not split by woo order splitter plugin In this article we will learn how to add product data if order is not split.

item.title: How to Add Anything After Wordpress Title in Backend ?
item.description: hi 👋 Learn how to add any Html / Text after wordpress editor title field. Note: This is only for the Classic Editor i am not sure about Gutenberg/Block Editor.

item.title: How to Automate the Wordpress Plugin Upload With Github Actions ?
item.description: Hello Friends, 👋 today we will learn about something interesting which is automation for wordoress svn repository. Automation is fun and make us more productive.

item.title: How to Get an Array of Random Numbers or elements in Wordpress ?
item.description: In this blog post, we will discuss generating a different type of array of numbers. Topics: How to generate a random number.

item.title: Your Browser Does Not Support Cookie Wordpress
item.description: Your browser does not support cookie wordpress I am recently working with the wordpress staging setup and i realise that i can not Login in to wordpress site.

item.title: How to Change the Date From Custom Custom Field in Wordpress
item.description: Hi 👋 we will use WordPress get_the_date() Hook. I will explain both. If you have created meta field for date post_custom_date.

item.title: How to Change Page Title by Custom Field in Wordpress
item.description: Prerequisite If I get right you come here to change this 😊 see in Pic below. If you are using custom theme make sure you have used this hook in your head tag.

item.title: How to Start With Gutenberg Editor Custom Block Development
item.description: How to start with Gutenberg Editor custom block development. Start learning Gutenberg very easily. See step by step Guide. How to start with Gutenberg editor development.

item.title: Fetch Instagram Details
item.description: Get-instagram-details You can find the live demo from this url https://vanpariyar.github.io/get-instagram-details/ In this demo, I have implemented the Instagram Public GraphQL API so no worry to get Instagram Token.

item.title: Google assistant with Wordpress blog
item.description: Google assistant chat app that fetch the new recent blog from creole Studios website. Made With Express and node Js Backend.

item.title: How to use SOcial Gallary Block In wordpress
item.description: Easy Doker Setup snap install docker pip install docker-compose docker-compose up goto : http://localhost:8080/ Live Plugin -> https://wordpress.org/plugins/social-gallery-block/ See the Demo Enter any Public UserName To this Plugin and You Will see the recent 16 posts.

item.title: How to use WP Post Views
item.description: wp-post-views Happy to announce that 😊 Plugin made as fun project 🙌 but Plugins crossed : 500+ Active installation And 2,500 download so far.
